text:
MEMORANDUM
To: All Staff
From: Management
Date: October 12
Subject: Office Renovation

Please be advised that the third-floor office will be undergoing renovations starting next Monday. During this time, staff members usually working on the third floor will be relocated to the second-floor conference room. We expect the work to be completed by Friday. Thank you for your cooperation.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the purpose of the memo?
options: To invite staff to a party

subQuestions.questionText: Where will the third-floor staff work next week?
